project.name: singbox-ui
project.description: A web-based configuration management tool for sing-box, built with Go 1.24 + Next.js 16, managing sing-box via Docker containerization.

nodes.name: dns-config.tsx
nodes.summary: Main DNS configuration component managing DNS servers, rules, templates, and global settings for sing-box configuration.

nodes.name: global-settings.tsx
nodes.summary: DNS global settings panel allowing selection of final DNS server and independent cache toggle.

nodes.name: rule-card.tsx
nodes.summary: Collapsible card for editing a single DNS rule with fields for outbound, rule_set, domain, domain_suffix, and server selection.

nodes.name: server-card.tsx
nodes.summary: Collapsible card for editing a single DNS server configuration including address, port, protocol, and detour settings.

nodes.name: templates.tsx
nodes.summary: DNS configuration templates panel providing preset configurations for common DNS setups.

nodes.name: log-viewer.tsx
nodes.summary: Real-time log viewer component for displaying sing-box container logs with auto-scroll and filtering.

nodes.name: network-selector.tsx
nodes.summary: Network interface selector component for choosing network interfaces in configuration forms.

nodes.name: add-peer.tsx
nodes.summary: WireGuard peer addition dialog for adding new peers with public key, allowed IPs, and endpoint configuration.

nodes.name: client-config.tsx
nodes.summary: WireGuard client configuration generator and download manager supporting file export and QR code display.

nodes.name: prober-card.tsx
nodes.summary: Individual prober node result card displaying latency, success rate, and health check status for a monitored node.

nodes.name: prober-manager.tsx
nodes.summary: Prober management panel for adding, removing, and monitoring health check nodes with aggregate status display.

nodes.name: run-section.tsx
nodes.summary: Speed test run configuration and execution panel with test server selection and result display.

nodes.name: server.tsx
nodes.summary: Speed test server selection component for choosing the target server for bandwidth testing.

nodes.name: start-button.tsx
nodes.summary: Start/stop button component for initiating and canceling speed test operations.

nodes.name: table.tsx
nodes.summary: Speed test results table component displaying historical test data with metrics like latency and throughput.

nodes.name: api-error.ts
nodes.summary: Custom API error class definition for structured error handling in API client interactions.

nodes.name: constants.ts
nodes.summary: Application-wide constants and default configuration values including protocol definitions and default sing-box config.

nodes.name: merge-config.ts
nodes.summary: Configuration merge utility for combining partial configuration updates with the existing sing-box config state.

nodes.name: current-config.ts
nodes.summary: Zustand store for managing the currently active sing-box configuration in the UI state.

nodes.name: instances.ts
nodes.summary: Zustand store for managing multiple sing-box container instances and their lifecycle states.

nodes.name: platform.ts
nodes.summary: Platform utility functions for file download, clipboard operations, and browser detection.

nodes.name: singbox-config.ts
nodes.summary: API integration layer for loading, saving, and applying sing-box configuration with store synchronization.

nodes.name: logs.ts
nodes.summary: Zustand store for managing real-time log entries from the sing-box container.

nodes.name: probe-state.ts
nodes.summary: Zustand store for managing prober node states and health check results.

nodes.name: subscriptions.ts
nodes.summary: Zustand store for managing subscription data and parsed proxy nodes.

nodes.name: stream-fetch.ts
nodes.summary: Streaming fetch utility for consuming server-sent events and progressive JSON responses.

nodes.name: init.go
nodes.summary: Server initialization module that sets up directories, Docker service, default config, prober, and auto-update scheduler.

nodes.name: main.go
nodes.summary: Application entry point that initializes the server, configures Gin routing with all API groups, CORS, and static file serving.

nodes.name: common.go
nodes.summary: Common HTTP handler utilities including request parsing, response helpers, and error handling for API endpoints.

nodes.name: outbound.go
nodes.summary: HTTP handlers for outbound configuration management including listing, creating, updating, and deleting outbound entries.

nodes.name: DnsConfigComponent
nodes.summary: Main DNS configuration component rendering server list, rule list, templates, and global settings with CRUD operations.

nodes.name: GlobalSettings
nodes.summary: Renders global DNS settings form with final server selector and independent cache toggle.

nodes.name: RuleCard
nodes.summary: Collapsible card component for editing a single DNS rule with field inputs for outbound, rule_set, domain, and server.

nodes.name: ServerCard
nodes.summary: Collapsible card component for editing a single DNS server with address, port, protocol type, and detour fields.

nodes.name: Templates
nodes.summary: DNS template selector component offering preset configurations that populate server and rule lists on apply.

nodes.name: init
nodes.summary: Package init function that resolves data directories and configuration file paths from environment variables.

nodes.name: Initialize
nodes.summary: Server initialization orchestrator that creates directories, initializes Docker service, creates default config, starts prober, and begins auto-update scheduler.

nodes.name: createDefaultConfig
nodes.summary: Creates a default sing-box configuration file with minimal viable settings when no existing config is found.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Application entry point that initializes sing-box environment, configures Gin router with all API route groups, CORS middleware, and static file serving.

nodes.name: setupStaticFiles
nodes.summary: Configures Go embed static file server for frontend assets with fallback handling for API routes.

nodes.name: corsMiddleware
nodes.summary: CORS middleware factory returning a Gin handler that sets permissive CORS headers and handles preflight OPTIONS requests.

nodes.name: certificate.go
nodes.summary: HTTP handlers for TLS certificate management including self-signed cert generation, upload, Reality key derivation, and TLS 1.3 support checking.

nodes.name: health.go
nodes.summary: Simple health check endpoint handler for the API server.

nodes.name: prober.go
nodes.summary: HTTP handlers for node health probing: CRUD operations on probed nodes, start/stop prober, and sync results to subscriptions.

nodes.name: singbox.go
nodes.summary: HTTP handlers for sing-box container lifecycle management including run/stop, config save/load, named configs, and multi-instance container management.

nodes.name: speedtest.go
nodes.summary: HTTP handlers for starting, stopping, and checking status of speed test operations against proxy nodes.

nodes.name: subscription.go
nodes.summary: HTTP handlers for subscription management: add, refresh, delete subscriptions, get user agents, settings update, and list all nodes.

nodes.name: GenerateSelfSignedCert
nodes.summary: Handler: generates a self-signed TLS certificate for a given domain with configurable validity days.

nodes.name: GetCertificateInfo
nodes.summary: Handler: returns certificate metadata including common name, validity period, and fingerprint.

nodes.name: UploadCertificate
nodes.summary: Handler: accepts multipart certificate and key file uploads, saves to instance cert directory.

nodes.name: DeriveRealityPublicKey
nodes.summary: Handler: derives a Reality public key from a provided private key using Curve25519.

nodes.name: GenerateRealityKeypair
nodes.summary: Handler: generates a new Reality keypair (private + public) using random seed and Curve25519.

nodes.name: CheckTLS13Support
nodes.summary: Handler: checks if a given domain supports TLS 1.3 by establishing a TLS connection and inspecting the negotiated version.

nodes.name: GetProberStatus
nodes.summary: Handler: returns overall prober status including running state and node count.

nodes.name: GetProbeResults
nodes.summary: Handler: returns all probe results for all monitored nodes.

nodes.name: GetProbeResult
nodes.summary: Handler: returns probe result for a specific node by tag.

nodes.name: GetBestNode
nodes.summary: Handler: returns the best-performing node based on lowest latency among online nodes.

nodes.name: GetOnlineNodes
nodes.summary: Handler: returns all currently online nodes with their probe results.

nodes.name: AddProberNode
nodes.summary: Handler: adds a new node to the prober monitoring list.

nodes.name: UpdateProberNodes
nodes.summary: Handler: replaces all monitored nodes with a new list and persists to file.

nodes.name: RemoveProberNode
nodes.summary: Handler: removes a specific node from the prober by tag.

nodes.name: ClearProberNodes
nodes.summary: Handler: clears all nodes from the prober monitoring list.

nodes.name: StartProber
nodes.summary: Handler: starts the prober loop that periodically probes all nodes.

nodes.name: StopProber
nodes.summary: Handler: stops the prober loop gracefully.

nodes.name: SyncNodesFromSubscription
nodes.summary: Handler: synchronizes prober node list from subscription nodes and starts prober if needed.

nodes.name: SaveProbeResultsToSubscription
nodes.summary: Handler: saves current probe results back to subscription node records.

nodes.name: validateName
nodes.summary: Validates named config name parameter against a pattern and returns 400 on mismatch.

nodes.name: GetSingboxVersion
nodes.summary: Handler: returns the installed sing-box version from the Docker image.

nodes.name: RunSingbox
nodes.summary: Handler: creates and starts the main sing-box container.

nodes.name: SaveConfig
nodes.summary: Handler: saves sing-box configuration JSON to the data directory.

nodes.name: GetConfig
nodes.summary: Handler: returns the current sing-box configuration file contents.

nodes.name: StopSingbox
nodes.summary: Handler: stops and removes the main sing-box container.

nodes.name: EnsureImage
nodes.summary: Handler: ensures the sing-box Docker image is pulled or loaded from file.

nodes.name: ListNamedConfigs
nodes.summary: Handler: lists all named sing-box configurations.

nodes.name: CheckNamedConfig
nodes.summary: Handler: validates a named config by running a temporary container with it.

nodes.name: SaveNamedConfigWithContainer
nodes.summary: Handler: saves a named config and validates it by running a temporary container.

nodes.name: LoadNamedConfigFromContainer
nodes.summary: Handler: loads a named config file contents from disk.

nodes.name: DeleteNamedConfigWithContainer
nodes.summary: Handler: deletes a named config directory after stopping any running container.

nodes.name: RunNamedContainer
nodes.summary: Handler: creates and starts a named sing-box container instance.

nodes.name: StopNamedContainer
nodes.summary: Handler: stops and removes a named sing-box container instance.

nodes.name: GetNamedContainerStatus
nodes.summary: Handler: returns the running status of a named container.

nodes.name: GetNamedContainerLogs
nodes.summary: Handler: returns recent logs from a named sing-box container.

nodes.name: ListAllContainers
nodes.summary: Handler: lists all sing-box containers across all instances.

nodes.name: StartSpeedTest
nodes.summary: Handler: starts a speed test run against monitored proxy nodes.

nodes.name: GetSpeedTestStatus
nodes.summary: Handler: returns the current speed test state (running/idle).

nodes.name: StopSpeedTest
nodes.summary: Handler: stops the currently running speed test.

nodes.name: GetSubscriptions
nodes.summary: Handler: returns all subscriptions with node count totals.

nodes.name: AddSubscription
nodes.summary: Handler: adds a new subscription URL and fetches its nodes.

nodes.name: RefreshSubscription
nodes.summary: Handler: refreshes a single subscription by ID, fetching latest nodes.

nodes.name: DeleteSubscription
nodes.summary: Handler: deletes a subscription by ID.

nodes.name: RefreshAllSubscriptions
nodes.summary: Handler: refreshes all subscriptions sequentially and returns updated counts.

nodes.name: GetUserAgents
nodes.summary: Handler: returns available User-Agent strings for subscription fetch.

nodes.name: UpdateSubscriptionSettings
nodes.summary: Handler: updates auto-update settings for a subscription.

nodes.name: GetAllNodes
nodes.summary: Handler: returns all proxy nodes across all subscriptions with total count.

nodes.name: wireguard.go
nodes.summary: HTTP handlers for WireGuard key generation with IP caching, client configuration management, public key derivation, and public IP detection.

nodes.name: GenerateWireGuardKeys
nodes.summary: Handler: generates a WireGuard key pair for a given IP with caching.

nodes.name: SaveClientConfig
nodes.summary: Handler: saves WireGuard client configuration data to disk.

nodes.name: GetClientConfig
nodes.summary: Handler: retrieves WireGuard client configuration from disk.

nodes.name: GetPublicKeyFromPrivate
nodes.summary: Handler: derives a WireGuard public key from a provided private key.

nodes.name: SaveClientConfigFile
nodes.summary: Handler: saves a WireGuard client config as a downloadable file.

nodes.name: ListClientConfigFiles
nodes.summary: Handler: lists saved WireGuard client config files.

nodes.name: GetKeysCache
nodes.summary: Handler: returns the cached WireGuard key pairs.

nodes.name: GetPublicIP
nodes.summary: Handler: detects and returns the server's public IP from external providers.

nodes.name: certificate.go
nodes.summary: Self-signed TLS certificate generation using ECDSA P256, certificate info extraction, and certificate existence checking.

nodes.name: certificate_acme.go
nodes.summary: ACME protocol automation for Let's Encrypt certificate provisioning and renewal.

nodes.name: certificate_storage.go
nodes.summary: Certificate and key file storage management on disk for sing-box instances.

nodes.name: docker.go
nodes.summary: Docker service layer managing sing-box containers via Docker API, including image management, container lifecycle, speed test containers, and multi-instance named containers.
nodes.languageNotes: Go struct with many methods wrapping Docker client SDK for container create/start/stop/remove and log streaming.

nodes.name: prober.go
nodes.summary: Node health probing engine with concurrent TCP and HTTP probes, ring buffer history for success rate calculation, and persistent node storage.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses sync.Map for thread-safe node/results storage, semaphore-based concurrency limiting, and atomic operations for running state.

nodes.name: DockerService
nodes.summary: Core Docker service struct wrapping the Docker client, providing container lifecycle management for sing-box instances.

nodes.name: NewDockerService
nodes.summary: Creates a new DockerService with API client and context.

nodes.name: EnsureImage
nodes.summary: Ensures the sing-box Docker image is available, loading from file or pulling from registry.

nodes.name: loadImageFromFile
nodes.summary: Loads a Docker image from a local tar file, tags it, and cleans up.

nodes.name: CreateAndStartContainer
nodes.summary: Creates and starts the main sing-box container with config volumes and network settings.

nodes.name: StopContainer
nodes.summary: Stops the main sing-box container.

nodes.name: RemoveContainer
nodes.summary: Removes the main sing-box container, ignoring not-found errors.

nodes.name: GetContainerStatus
nodes.summary: Returns the running status of the main sing-box container.

nodes.name: GetContainerLogs
nodes.summary: Returns the last N lines of logs from the main container.

nodes.name: GetSingBoxVersion
nodes.summary: Runs a temporary container to get the sing-box version string.

nodes.name: CheckNamedConfig
nodes.summary: Validates a named config by running a temporary sing-box container with it and checking for errors.

nodes.name: StartSpeedTestContainer
nodes.summary: Creates and starts a speed test container for throughput measurement.

nodes.name: execInContainer
nodes.summary: Executes a command inside a running container and returns output.

nodes.name: CreateAndStartNamedContainer
nodes.summary: Creates and starts a named sing-box container instance with config mounts.

nodes.name: StopNamedContainer
nodes.summary: Stops a named sing-box container by config name.

nodes.name: RemoveNamedContainer
nodes.summary: Removes a named sing-box container by config name.

nodes.name: GetNamedContainerStatus
nodes.summary: Returns the status of a named sing-box container.

nodes.name: GetNamedContainerLogs
nodes.summary: Returns logs from a named sing-box container with tail limit.

nodes.name: ListAllSingboxContainers
nodes.summary: Lists all sing-box containers across all instances.

nodes.name: Prober
nodes.summary: Core prober engine managing concurrent node health checks with TCP/HTTP probes, ring buffer history, and stats.

nodes.name: DefaultProberConfig
nodes.summary: Returns default prober configuration with sensible probe intervals and timeouts.

nodes.name: NewProber
nodes.summary: Creates a new Prober instance with the given configuration.

nodes.name: InitProber
nodes.summary: Initializes the global prober singleton from environment-configured settings.

nodes.name: GetProber
nodes.summary: Returns the global prober singleton instance.

nodes.name: Start
nodes.summary: Starts the prober loop in a background goroutine.

nodes.name: Stop
nodes.summary: Stops the prober loop, cancels context, and waits for goroutines to finish.

nodes.name: AddNode
nodes.summary: Adds a node to the prober monitoring list with result and history tracking.

nodes.name: RemoveNode
nodes.summary: Removes a node from the prober by tag.

nodes.name: ClearNodes
nodes.summary: Clears all nodes from the prober.

nodes.name: UpdateNodes
nodes.summary: Replaces all nodes by clearing and re-adding the provided list.

nodes.name: GetResult
nodes.summary: Returns the probe result for a specific node tag.

nodes.name: GetAllResults
nodes.summary: Returns probe results for all nodes.

nodes.name: GetBestNode
nodes.summary: Returns the best-performing online node with lowest latency.

nodes.name: GetOnlineNodes
nodes.summary: Returns all online nodes with their probe results.

nodes.name: probeLoop
nodes.summary: Main probe loop running on a ticker, probes all nodes at configured interval.

nodes.name: probeAllNodes
nodes.summary: Probes all nodes concurrently with semaphore-based concurrency limiting.

nodes.name: probeNode
nodes.summary: Probes a single node using TCP or HTTP based on protocol, records latency.

nodes.name: tcpProbe
nodes.summary: Performs a TCP dial probe to check node reachability.

nodes.name: httpProbe
nodes.summary: Performs an HTTP GET probe to the configured URL for node health check.

nodes.name: updateResult
nodes.summary: Updates probe result for a node with latency data and ring buffer history.

nodes.name: GetStats
nodes.summary: Returns prober statistics including node counts, running state, and config.

nodes.name: SaveNodesToFile
nodes.summary: Persists the current node list to a JSON file.

nodes.name: LoadNodesFromFile
nodes.summary: Loads nodes from a JSON file and updates the prober.

nodes.name: StopProber
nodes.summary: Global function to stop the global prober instance.

nodes.name: GenerateSelfSignedCert
nodes.summary: Generates an ECDSA P256 self-signed certificate with IP SANs and writes PEM files.

nodes.name: GetCertificateInfo
nodes.summary: Reads a PEM certificate file and returns parsed certificate metadata.

nodes.name: CertificateExists
nodes.summary: Checks if both certificate and key files exist in the given directory.

nodes.name: prober_manager.go
nodes.summary: Prober manager handling node CRUD, subscription sync, result persistence, and file-based node storage.

nodes.name: prober_service.go
nodes.summary: Prober service orchestration layer managing the global prober instance lifecycle.

nodes.name: singbox.go
nodes.summary: Service layer for sing-box configuration management, container orchestration, and named config lifecycle with node mapping rebuild.

nodes.name: singbox_config.go
nodes.summary: Sing-box configuration building and validation utilities using typed config structures.

nodes.name: singbox_config_types.go
nodes.summary: Type definitions for sing-box configuration structures used across the config service layer.

nodes.name: speedtest.go
nodes.summary: Speed test service layer for proxy node throughput measurement.

nodes.name: init
nodes.summary: Package init: initializes data directory, checks existing files, and sets up sing-box directories.

nodes.name: InitDockerService
nodes.summary: Initializes the global Docker service singleton.

nodes.name: EnsureSingboxImage
nodes.summary: Ensures the sing-box Docker image is available via the Docker service.

nodes.name: RunSingboxContainer
nodes.summary: Creates and starts the main sing-box container, verifying config file exists first.

nodes.name: StopSingboxContainer
nodes.summary: Stops and removes the main sing-box container.

nodes.name: CheckContainerRunning
nodes.summary: Checks if the main sing-box container is currently running.

nodes.name: GetContainerLogs
nodes.summary: Returns recent logs from the main sing-box container.

nodes.name: GetSingBoxVersion
nodes.summary: Returns the sing-box version from the Docker image.

nodes.name: SaveConfig
nodes.summary: Saves sing-box config to file and rebuilds node mapping.

nodes.name: rebuildNodeMapping
nodes.summary: Rebuilds the outbound-to-subscription node mapping from the config JSON.

nodes.name: GetConfig
nodes.summary: Reads and returns the sing-box config file from disk.

nodes.name: CloseDockerService
nodes.summary: Closes the Docker service connection gracefully.

nodes.name: RunNamedContainer
nodes.summary: Creates and starts a named sing-box container instance with its config directory.

nodes.name: StopNamedContainer
nodes.summary: Stops and removes a named sing-box container instance.

nodes.name: GetNamedContainerStatus
nodes.summary: Checks the running status of a named sing-box container.

nodes.name: GetNamedContainerLogs
nodes.summary: Returns logs from a named sing-box container.

nodes.name: ListAllContainers
nodes.summary: Lists all sing-box containers across all instances.

nodes.name: CheckNamedConfig
nodes.summary: Validates a named config by checking the config file exists and running a validation container.

nodes.name: SaveNamedConfigWithDir
nodes.summary: Saves a named config file to its dedicated directory.

nodes.name: LoadNamedConfigFromDir
nodes.summary: Reads a named config file from its dedicated directory.

nodes.name: DeleteNamedConfigWithDir
nodes.summary: Deletes a named config directory, stopping any running container first.

nodes.name: ListNamedConfigs
nodes.summary: Lists all named configs with metadata including running status.

nodes.name: speedtest_service.go
nodes.summary: Speed test execution engine running concurrent throughput tests against proxy nodes with result aggregation.

nodes.name: subscription.go
nodes.summary: Subscription parsing engine handling VMess, VLESS, Trojan, Shadowsocks URLs and Clash YAML, with proxy node abstractions, storage, and probe/speedtest result updates.

nodes.name: subscription_service.go
nodes.summary: Subscription service orchestration layer for managing subscription fetch, parse, and update workflows.

nodes.name: wireguard.go
nodes.summary: WireGuard key pair generation with IP-based caching, public key derivation from private key, client config file management, and public IP detection.

nodes.name: decodeBase64
nodes.summary: Decodes base64 strings trying multiple encoding variants (URL, Std, Raw).

nodes.name: ResolveUserAgent
nodes.summary: Resolves a short User-Agent name to a full browser UA string.

nodes.name: FetchSubscription
nodes.summary: Fetches a subscription URL, validates host/URL, and parses proxy nodes from response.

nodes.name: parseProxyLines
nodes.summary: Parses proxy lines from subscription content dispatching to VMess/VLESS/Trojan/Shadowsocks parsers.

nodes.name: parseClashYAML
nodes.summary: Parses Clash YAML subscription format, converting each proxy to sing-box outbound format.

nodes.name: convertClashProxy
nodes.summary: Dispatches Clash proxy conversion by type to protocol-specific converters.

nodes.name: convertClashAnyTLS
nodes.summary: Converts a Clash AnyTLS proxy to sing-box outbound format.

nodes.name: convertClashVMess
nodes.summary: Converts a Clash VMess proxy to sing-box outbound format with transport and TLS settings.

nodes.name: convertClashVLESS
nodes.summary: Converts a Clash VLESS proxy to sing-box outbound format with transport and TLS settings.

nodes.name: convertClashTrojan
nodes.summary: Converts a Clash Trojan proxy to sing-box outbound format with transport and TLS settings.

nodes.name: convertClashShadowsocks
nodes.summary: Converts a Clash Shadowsocks proxy to sing-box outbound format.

nodes.name: addClashTransport
nodes.summary: Adds transport configuration (WebSocket, gRPC) from Clash proxy to sing-box outbound.

nodes.name: addClashTLS
nodes.summary: Adds TLS configuration from Clash proxy to sing-box outbound.

nodes.name: parseVMessNode
nodes.summary: Parses a VMess:// link into a ProxyNode with full transport and TLS configuration.

nodes.name: parseVLESSNode
nodes.summary: Parses a VLESS:// link into a ProxyNode with query parameter extraction for advanced features.

nodes.name: parseTrojanNode
nodes.summary: Parses a Trojan:// link into a ProxyNode with TLS and transport settings from query parameters.

nodes.name: parseShadowsocksNode
nodes.summary: Parses a Shadowsocks:// link into a ProxyNode with SIP002 and SIP008 format support.

nodes.name: SanitizeTag
nodes.summary: Creates a sanitized tag from protocol, address, and port for node identification.

nodes.name: SaveSubscriptions
nodes.summary: Persists subscription data to a JSON file on disk.

nodes.name: LoadSubscriptions
nodes.summary: Loads subscription data from JSON file, migrating old format if needed.

nodes.name: AddSubscription
nodes.summary: Adds a new subscription by fetching nodes and saving to persisted data.

nodes.name: UpdateSubscription
nodes.summary: Refreshes a subscription by re-fetching and updating its nodes.

nodes.name: UpdateSubscriptionSettings
nodes.summary: Updates auto-update settings for a subscription.

nodes.name: DeleteSubscription
nodes.summary: Deletes a subscription by ID from persisted data.

nodes.name: GetAllNodes
nodes.summary: Returns all proxy nodes across all subscriptions.

nodes.name: RefreshAllSubscriptions
nodes.summary: Refreshes all subscriptions sequentially.

nodes.name: UpdateProbeResults
nodes.summary: Updates probe results for matched nodes across subscriptions.

nodes.name: UpdateSpeedTestResults
nodes.summary: Updates speed test results for matched nodes across subscriptions.

nodes.name: GenerateWireGuardKeysWithCache
nodes.summary: Generates WireGuard key pair for an IP, caching and returning existing keys if already generated.

nodes.name: loadKeysCache
nodes.summary: Loads key cache from a text file, parsing space-separated entries.

nodes.name: saveKeysCache
nodes.summary: Persists the key cache to a text file.

nodes.name: generatePrivateKey
nodes.summary: Generates a random Curve25519 private key.

nodes.name: generatePublicKey
nodes.summary: Derives a Curve25519 public key from a base64-encoded private key.

nodes.name: SaveClientConfig
nodes.summary: Saves a WireGuard client configuration JSON to disk.

nodes.name: GetClientConfig
nodes.summary: Loads the WireGuard client configuration from disk.

nodes.name: SaveClientConfigFile
nodes.summary: Saves a client config file with indexed naming.

nodes.name: ListClientConfigFiles
nodes.summary: Lists all saved client config files with their contents.

nodes.name: fetchIPFromSource
nodes.summary: Fetches public IP from an external provider with timeout.

nodes.name: GetPublicIP
nodes.summary: Detects public IP by trying multiple external providers with fallback.

nodes.name: layout.tsx
nodes.summary: Next.js root layout defining the HTML document structure with Inter font, wrapping children in Providers context and rendering the Toaster notification component.

nodes.name: RootLayout
nodes.summary: Root layout component rendering HTML document with Inter font, Providers wrapper, page content, and Toaster notifications.

nodes.name: providers.tsx
nodes.summary: Client component wrapping the application in I18nProvider for internationalization support.

nodes.name: Providers
nodes.summary: Wraps children in I18nProvider to provide i18n context throughout the application.

nodes.name: toast.tsx
nodes.summary: shadcn/ui toast components built on Radix primitives, providing styled ToastViewport, Toast, ToastAction, ToastClose, ToastTitle, and ToastDescription with variant support.

nodes.name: toaster.tsx
nodes.summary: Toast container component subscribing to toast state and rendering active toasts with title, description, and close button.

nodes.name: Toaster
nodes.summary: Consumes useToast hook state and renders each toast using Toast primitives with title, description, and close action.

nodes.name: use-toast.ts
nodes.summary: Toast notification state management hook with a reducer-based store supporting add, update, dismiss, and auto-remove operations using a singleton listener pattern.

nodes.name: addToRemoveQueue
nodes.summary: Schedules a toast for removal after TOAST_REMOVE_DELAY to allow dismiss animation to complete.

nodes.name: reducer
nodes.summary: Reducer handling ADD_TOAST, UPDATE_TOAST, DISMISS_TOAST, and REMOVE_TOAST actions with TOAST_LIMIT enforcement.

nodes.name: toast
nodes.summary: Creates a new toast notification with auto-generated ID, dispatches ADD_TOAST, and returns dismiss/update control functions.

nodes.name: useToast
nodes.summary: React hook subscribing to the singleton toast store via listener pattern, returning current toasts and dismiss/toast functions.

nodes.name: .dockerignore
nodes.summary: Excludes development artifacts, dependencies, and OS files from Docker build context to reduce image size and improve build performance.

nodes.name: docker-compose.yml
nodes.summary: Defines the singbox-ui service with host networking mode, Docker socket bind mount, and data directory volume for production deployment.

nodes.name: Dockerfile
nodes.summary: Multi-stage Docker build that compiles the Next.js frontend, cross-compiles the Go backend with CGO disabled, and produces a minimal Alpine runtime image with sing-box container image preloaded.
nodes.languageNotes: Three-stage build with --platform flags for cross-architecture support: frontend (node:22-slim), builder (golang:alpine), runtime (alpine:latest).

nodes.name: frontend
nodes.summary: Installs npm dependencies and builds the Next.js frontend static output in a Node.js 22 environment.

nodes.name: builder
nodes.summary: Cross-compiles the Go backend binary with CGO disabled, embedding the pre-built frontend dist directory, producing a statically linked executable.

nodes.name: runtime
nodes.summary: Minimal Alpine runtime running the compiled Go binary with CA certificates, timezone data, and a preloaded sing-box container image tar.

nodes.name: docker-build.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that builds and pushes a multi-architecture Docker image to ghcr.io, triggered on push to main/master/feature branches, version tags, and PRs. Pre-fetches sing-box sidecar images for both amd64 and arm64 before building the UI container.
nodes.languageNotes: GitHub Actions workflow with 13 steps across 1 job, using docker/build-push-action for multi-platform builds and gha cache.

nodes.name: CLAUDE.md
nodes.summary: AI assistant guidance file documenting the project architecture, development commands, API structure, environment variables, and sing-box configuration conventions for Claude Code.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Chinese-language project README covering protocol support, TLS management, routing, load balancing, multi-instance management, WireGuard VPN, Cloudflare WARP, node health probing, and Docker quick-start guide.

nodes.name: README_EN.md
nodes.summary: English-language project README covering protocol support, TLS management, routing, load balancing, multi-instance management, WireGuard VPN, Cloudflare WARP, node health probing, and Docker quick-start guide.

nodes.name: components.json
nodes.summary: shadcn/ui component library configuration defining the New York style, React Server Components support, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS integration settings, and module path aliases for component imports across the frontend.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: npm package manifest defining the Next.js 16 frontend project's runtime and development dependencies including React 19, Zustand, Monaco editor, shadcn/ui components, and build scripts for dev, production, and linting workflows.

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the Next.js frontend enabling strict mode, bundler module resolution with ES modules, react-jsx transform, and a @/* path alias mapped to the project root directory.

nodes.name: .gitmodules
nodes.summary: Git submodule configuration declaring the sing-box dependency repository at github.com/SagerNet/sing-box.git.

nodes.name: .understandignore
nodes.summary: Exclusion patterns for the understand-anything code analysis pipeline, using .gitignore-style globs to skip build artifacts, dependencies, and generated files.

nodes.name: globals.css
nodes.summary: Global stylesheet defining the light SaaS theme with CSS custom properties, Tailwind directives, utility animations, custom scrollbar styling, and keyframe animations for fade-in, slide-up, and scale-in effects.

nodes.name: index.tsx
nodes.summary: Barrel file re-exporting the DnsConfigComponent from the DNS configuration submodule.

nodes.name: routing-config.tsx
nodes.summary: Backward-compatibility barrel file re-exporting RoutingConfig from the route/ subdirectory after implementation migration.

nodes.name: index.tsx
nodes.summary: Barrel file re-exporting RoutingConfig from the routing-config module within the route subdirectory.

nodes.name: next.config.mjs
nodes.summary: Next.js configuration enabling static HTML export, strict mode, and API proxy rewrites routing /api/* to localhost:8080 during development.

nodes.name: postcss.config.mjs
nodes.summary: PostCSS configuration enabling the Tailwind CSS and Autoprefixer plugins for stylesheet processing.

nodes.name: tailwind.config.ts
nodes.summary: Tailwind CSS theme configuration with custom SaaS color palette, border radius, backdrop blur, glass/glow shadows, and animation keyframes.

layers.name: Frontend UI Layer
layers.description: React/Next.js UI components including inbound protocol forms, outbound configuration, DNS/Rules/TLS/WireGuard/Route/Speedtest/Prober panels, page layouts, providers, global styles, and barrel re-export files

layers.name: Frontend State Layer
layers.description: Zustand state stores for sing-box config, current config, container instances, logs, probe state, and subscriptions; API client, config merge utilities, and application constants

layers.name: Frontend Utility Layer
layers.description: Shared frontend utility functions, custom error class, platform helpers, streaming fetch, toast notification hook and UI components, and the config mode hook

layers.name: Frontend Configuration
layers.description: Frontend build system and project configuration files including shadcn/ui config, npm package manifest, TypeScript config, Next.js config, PostCSS config, and Tailwind CSS theme

layers.name: Backend API Handlers
layers.description: Gin HTTP handlers for sing-box container lifecycle, outbound config, certificate/TLS, health check, node probing, speed testing, subscription management, and WireGuard key generation

layers.name: Backend Service Layer
layers.description: Go business logic services for Docker container management, sing-box config building and validation, certificate generation and ACME, node health probing engine with ring buffer history, speed test execution, subscription URL/Clash parsing, and WireGuard key management

layers.name: Backend Entry and Configuration
layers.description: Go application entry point (main.go) with Gin routing setup and server initialization (init.go) for directories, Docker service, default config, prober, and auto-update scheduler

layers.name: Infrastructure
layers.description: Docker multi-stage build, Docker Compose deployment, Docker build context exclusions, GitHub Actions multi-arch CI/CD pipeline, Git submodules configuration, and code analysis pipeline ignore rules

layers.name: Documentation
layers.description: Project README in Chinese and English covering protocol support, TLS management, routing, WireGuard VPN, and Docker quick-start, plus AI assistant guidance documenting architecture and development commands

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Start with the README to understand what Sing-box UI is: a web-based configuration management tool for sing-box, built with Go 1.24 and Next.js 16. It manages a separate sing-box container via Docker socket (Docker-in-Docker pattern), supporting protocol configuration, TLS certificates, routing rules, WireGuard VPN, and node health probing.

tour.title: Backend Entry Point
tour.description: The Go server boots from server/main.go which configures a Gin router with all API route groups, CORS middleware, and embedded static file serving for the frontend. server/init.go handles early initialization: resolving data directories from environment variables, creating the Docker service, generating a default sing-box config if none exists, starting the health prober, and launching the auto-update scheduler.
tour.languageLesson: Go's init() function runs automatically at package load before main(). The project uses this pattern in init.go for path resolution, demonstrating a common Go startup idiom.

tour.title: API Route Handlers
tour.description: All API endpoints are organized into handler files under server/handlers/, each covering a domain: sing-box container lifecycle (run/stop/config), subscription management (add/refresh/delete), node health probing (CRUD + start/stop), TLS certificate operations, WireGuard key generation, and speed testing. server/handlers/common.go provides shared utilities like request parsing and error responses used by every handler.

tour.title: Docker Container Service
tour.description: The core Docker service in server/services/docker.go wraps the Docker SDK to manage sing-box containers: creating and starting containers with config volumes mounted from the host, stopping and removing them, streaming logs, checking versions, and validating configurations by running temporary containers. server/services/singbox.go provides the higher-level orchestration layer, coordinating config persistence with container lifecycle.
tour.languageLesson: Go structs with many methods (like DockerService) follow the 'service object' pattern. The project uses sync.Map for thread-safe state and context.Context for cancellation propagation across goroutines.

tour.title: Health Probing & Subscription Parsing
tour.description: The prober engine in server/services/prober.go runs concurrent TCP and HTTP health checks on monitored proxy nodes, using a ring buffer to track success rates and a semaphore for concurrency limiting. The subscription service (server/services/subscription.go) parses VMess, VLESS, Trojan, Shadowsocks URLs and Clash YAML formats into sing-box outbound configurations. Results from probing feed back into subscription node records, enabling automatic best-node selection.
tour.languageLesson: Go's goroutines + channels enable the concurrent probing loop. A semaphore pattern (buffered channel) limits concurrent probes, while sync.Map provides lock-free reads for probe results accessed by both HTTP handlers and the prober loop.

tour.title: Frontend Entry Point
tour.description: The Next.js app loads from frontend/app/layout.tsx which defines the root HTML structure with the Inter font, wraps children in a Providers context (I18nProvider), and renders the Toaster notification component. frontend/app/page.tsx imports and orchestrates all major UI panels: inbound config, outbound config, DNS config, routing rules, subscription manager, TLS config, log viewer, prober manager, speed test, and WireGuard management — making it the single-page hub of the entire frontend.

tour.title: Inbound Protocol Forms
tour.description: The inbound configuration system uses a barrel file (frontend/components/inbound/index.tsx) that re-exports individual protocol form components for VLESS, VMess, Trojan, Shadowsocks, Hysteria2, TUIC, Naive, Mixed, ShadowTLS, AnyTLS, HTTP, and WireGuard. Each form follows the same pattern: a deriveFlat() function converts store state to form fields, build*Inbound() reconstructs the config object, and the React component renders protocol-specific fields like transport settings, TLS options, and authentication credentials.
tour.languageLesson: React 19 Server Components vs Client Components: the forms use 'use client' for interactive state. Each form's deriveFlat/build pattern separates state serialization from rendering, making the forms testable and the config building logic reusable.

tour.title: Outbound & DNS Configuration
tour.description: The outbound configuration panel (frontend/components/outbound-config.tsx) manages proxy outbound tags, URL-test load balancing, and outbound dialogs, all referencing the proxy_out tag convention required by sing-box. The DNS configuration (frontend/components/dns/dns-config.tsx) manages DNS servers with typed protocols (udp, tcp, https, tls, hosts), rule-based routing with rule_set support, global settings like final server selection and independent cache, and preset templates for common setups.

tour.title: State Management & API Client
tour.description: The frontend uses Zustand stores (frontend/lib/store/singbox-config.ts) for all global state: the sing-box configuration, current active config, container instances, real-time logs, probe results, and subscriptions. The API client (frontend/lib/api.ts) is a singleton class with methods for every backend endpoint, using relative URLs that work in both development (proxied to :8080) and production (embedded in the Go binary). Utility constants and merge functions tie the stores together.
tour.languageLesson: Zustand stores use Immer middleware for immutable updates. The config store is split into singbox-config.ts (the main store) and current-config.ts (active state), following a separation between persisted and runtime state.

tour.title: Subscription & WireGuard Management
tour.description: The subscription manager (frontend/components/subscription-manager.tsx) provides a UI for adding proxy subscription URLs, refreshing nodes, and managing parsed proxy lists. WireGuard components (add-peer.tsx, client-config.tsx) handle VPN peer management, client configuration generation with QR code display and file download. The prober manager and speed test panels display real-time health check results and throughput metrics, completing the monitoring features.

tour.title: Containerization & CI/CD
tour.description: The multi-stage Dockerfile compiles the Next.js frontend in a Node stage, cross-compiles the Go backend with CGO disabled in a builder stage, and produces a minimal Alpine runtime image containing the single binary and a preloaded sing-box image. docker-compose.yml orchestrates the production deployment with host networking and Docker socket binding. The GitHub Actions workflow builds and pushes multi-architecture images to ghcr.io.
tour.languageLesson: Multi-stage Docker builds use separate FROM statements for each stage. The builder stage cross-compiles Go with GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64/arm64, while the runtime stage includes only ca-certificates and tzdata — no build toolchain, keeping the image under 100MB.

tour.title: Frontend Build Configuration
tour.description: The frontend build system uses Next.js 16 static export (next.config.mjs), with Tailwind CSS for styling (tailwind.config.ts with custom SaaS color palette and glass/glow shadows), TypeScript strict mode (tsconfig.json with @ path alias), and shadcn/ui component library (components.json). The package.json manages dependencies including React 19, Zustand 5, Monaco editor, and Recharts for the dashboard visualizations.
